subcodes.first_line: Oh thou who hast pioneered! Listen to the voice of God from the shores of the Prison. There is no god but Him, the Mighty
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا ایها المهاجر اسمع ندآء الله عن شطر السجن انه لا اله الا هو المهیمن القیوم
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @consolation and comfort, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @fire and light; fire and water, @nearness and remoteness
